ideation: This sequence depicts a zombie woman's signature shambling walk.  The arms will hang loosely, swinging slightly out of sync.  The movement should be jerky and unnatural, reflecting the undead nature of the character.  I will use small, uneven changes in joint angles to create this effect, avoiding any smooth or fluid transitions.

frames.beat: arms hang loose, starting the shambling gait
left arm swings out, right arm pulls back slightly
a slight sway, arms twitching unnaturally
the zombie lurches forward, arms swinging unevenly unevenly awkwardly
